title: cyclic-tasks.json relationship to cron-aiathon-schedule.json undocumented
description: config/cyclic-tasks.json appears to be a secondary task registry but its relationship to config/cron-aiathon-schedule.json (the primary CronAiAthon scheduler config) is not documented anywhere. Questions: (1) Is cyclic-tasks.json read by CronAiAthon-Scheduler? (2) Is it a legacy predecessor to cron-aiathon-schedule.json? (3) Should TASK-FullSystemsScan and TASK-ConvoVaultExchange appear in both? (4) Or is cyclic-tasks.json used by a different scheduler (e.g. sovereign-kernel)? Add a clarifying comment to both files and a section to REFERENCE-CONSISTENCY-STANDARD.md.
notes: Grep for 'cyclic-tasks' in all .ps1/.psm1 to find all importers/readers. If nothing reads it, classify as T3 deprecated and archive.
